text:
The Financial Remedies Court of England & Wales | Financial Remedies Guide 2026
42. If the application is allocated to High Court Judge level then it is likely that a
composite list of dates that both parties can do (not dates to avoid) will be
required to be sent to the High Court financial remedies email address at
rcj.highcourtFR@justice.gov.uk by a deadline specified in the allocation order.
